meaning: adj.可敬的,有名望的,高尚的,值得尊敬的
examples: I have to prove myself as a respectable, balanced person.
He came from a perfectly respectable middle-class family.
The former wild man of rock has reinvented himself as a respectable family man.
In 2010 Bentley's global sales grew by a respectable 11%, to more than 5, 000 cars.
And it seems as if any respectable corporation has scores of billions in the bank.
